rulings.Case Title: TERESA RODRIGUEZ VS. REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: MATTER IS SET FOR HEARING ON JUNE 2, 2006. DEFENDANTS REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, CATHY DURAN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AND DENIED AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED 1)ALL DISCRIMINATION CAUSES OF ACTION AGAINST DURAN. 2)ALL RACE AND AGE DISCRIMINATION AND HARASSMENT CAUSE OF ACTION FOR THERE WAS NO OPPOSITION FILED. DENIED: 1)DISABILITY DISCRIMINATION-TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER DEFENDANT REASONABLY ACCOMODATED PLAINTIFF, ALSO WHETHER DEFENDANT CONSTRUCTIVELY TERMINATED THE PLAINTIFF. 2)DISABILITY HARASSMENT - TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER DEFENDANT'S CONDUCTED SUFFICIENT PERVASIVE/EXTREME HOSTILE WORKING ENVIRONMENT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE PROPOSED ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP SEC. 437c(g). = (302/REQ/PB)
